business.name: BFIT Yasmeen Men's
business.address: الملك عبدالعزيز، 4542،, حي الياسمين،, RAYA7848، 7848, Riyadh 13325, Saudi Arabia

reviews.author: thaufer algahtani
reviews.text:
B-Fit is one of the cleanest and most well-maintained gyms I’ve been to. The facility is aesthetically pleasing and clearly cared for, which makes it a great environment to train in. The gym is so great to be in sometimes i even study in it. The variety of equipment is excellent, with a wide range of machines and free weights that allow you to train every muscle group effectively. Everything is organized and modern.

I also want to give a special endorsement to my coach, Alexander. From the start, he was extremely friendly and welcoming and took the time to teach me the ropes on both machines and free weights. He pushes you to your limits while making sure your form and technique are correct. The knowledge and wisdom he shared with me are things I’ve never been able to find online or on YouTube. In just a few weeks of training with him, I’ve made more progress than I did lifting on my own for months. He is incredibly experienced, and I highly recommend him to anyone looking to seriously improve their fitness.
reviews.originalText:
B-Fit is one of the cleanest and most well-maintained gyms I’ve been to. The facility is aesthetically pleasing and clearly cared for, which makes it a great environment to train in. The gym is so great to be in sometimes i even study in it. The variety of equipment is excellent, with a wide range of machines and free weights that allow you to train every muscle group effectively. Everything is organized and modern.

I also want to give a special endorsement to my coach, Alexander. From the start, he was extremely friendly and welcoming and took the time to teach me the ropes on both machines and free weights. He pushes you to your limits while making sure your form and technique are correct. The knowledge and wisdom he shared with me are things I’ve never been able to find online or on YouTube. In just a few weeks of training with him, I’ve made more progress than I did lifting on my own for months. He is incredibly experienced, and I highly recommend him to anyone looking to seriously improve their fitness.

reviews.author: Fahad Saleh
reviews.text:
Great gym with a positive atmosphere, clean facilities, and great equipment. The staff are friendly and professional, making every visit enjoyable.

Special thanks to trainer Alexander for his knowledge, support, and dedication — truly makes a difference. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Abdurrahman Al Arefi
reviews.text: Great gym, 90% of what you need is available here in much higher than average level of similar brands. But busier in terms of amount of people also, doesn’t have many classes so depends on your own program. Coaches are only responsive when …
